final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书 (Xiaohongshu) style 9-grid cover vertical image for a "素人" (everyday-person) content creator reviewing the 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人" (everyday-person / authentic UGC) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9-grid (九宫格) layout, vertical format, central title text prominently placed in the middle
Subject: must include the 大疆 Pocket 4 camera as the featured product, naturally integrated into the composition
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, lifestyle-oriented backdrop fitting a "素人" creator aesthetic — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable, everyday atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful direction fitting 小红书 content style — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (large, centered, primary title); font must feel cute and differentiated — exact typeface execution is yours
Constraints: must preserve 9-grid vertical cover format; product 大疆 Pocket 4 must be visually recognizable; title text must be the focal typographic element
Avoid: must avoid overly polished commercial advertising look; must avoid professional studio aesthetic
